title: Ceramic Shears
description: Adds Ceramic Shears made of clay.
body:
# Ceramic Shears

This is a Minecraft mod which adds Ceramic Shears to the game. (Forge, NeoForge, Fabric, Quilt) So it is possible to craft shears out of clay.

![Crafting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/cech12/CeramicShears/1.19/material/crafting.png "Crafting")

Adds 3 items to the game:

* Clay Shears Part: Craftable with two clay balls.
* Ceramic Shears Part: Craftable in furnace with a Clay Shears Part.
* Ceramic Shears: Act like vanilla shears but has only 75% durability. Craftable with two Ceramic Shears Part.

The **durability** is configurable since mod version 1.6.0.0.

The Fabric / Quilt version needs the following mods:

- Fabric API ([Github](https://github.com/FabricMC/fabric), [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api), [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)) 
- Cloth Config API ([Github](https://github.com/shedaniel/cloth-config), [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config), [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config))
- (for Minecraft 1.20.4) WSMLMB ([Github](https://github.com/AnAwesomGuy/wsmlmb), [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wsmlmb), [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/wsmlmb))

There is also a [wiki](https://github.com/cech12/CeramicShears/wiki) where you can read all details about the mod.

## FAQ

### Can I use this mod in my mod pack?
Yes, you are allowed to use this mod in your mod packs.

### Port to another Minecraft version? Which versions are supported?
Sorry, but I do not backport any mod to an older version. Here is a list of all supported and planned versions: [Minecraft mod versions of cech12](https://gist.github.com/cech12/662e37d2f8524037d9fef8fbe90bed5a)

### Is there a Fabric version?
Yes, since 1.20.4 Fabric and Quilt are officially supported. There is no plan to backport Fabric support to earlier Minecraft versions. For earlier versions, please check out the [Stone Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/stone-utils) mod.

### Where is the config file? 
There is a defaultconfig directory, where you can find it. If you change something there it has only an effect on new savegames. For existing savegames you need to go to the serverconfig directory of the savegame. 

### I found a bug or I have a good idea to enhance this mod!
Very good! Open an [issue at Github](https://github.com/cech12/CeramicShears/issues) or contact me on Discord.
